title: Hotel Management AI Chatbot
description: Multi-agent AI system built with LangChain + Groq Llama 3.3. Implements Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) for automated guest services, with a relational DB schema via SQLAlchemy ORM. Automated reporting is distributed through SMTP and scheduled with APScheduler.

title: Smart Tool-Routing Assistant
description: A LangGraph AI agent that first decides HOW to answer a question, then routes it to the right tool — a calculator for math, document search (RAG) for uploaded files, or the LLM directly for general questions. Every answer shows the chosen tool and a one-line reason, so the routing is fully transparent. Reached ~92% routing accuracy across three intent classes on a 55-question labeled set (up from 84% after prompt refinement), measured with per-class F1 and a confusion matrix.

title: Smart Meeting & Lecture Notes Agent
description: An AI note-taker that turns meeting or lecture audio (or a pasted transcript) into a clean summary, the key decisions, and a checklist of action items with owners. Each transcript line is classified as a decision, action, or discussion, so only meaningful content reaches the structured output. Built with Streamlit and faster-whisper for free local transcription plus Azure OpenAI GPT-4.1; achieved ~0.85 action-item F1 and 92% line-classification accuracy on a labeled multi-transcript test set.

title: Large-Scale City Partitioning
description: Processed a 6 GB city-scale dataset using Mini-Batch K-Means with incremental partial-fit. Segments geographic regions without loading the full dataset into memory — memory-efficient unsupervised ML at scale.

title: Cricket Player Performance Dashboard
description: Power BI analytics dashboard transforming 5,000+ raw data points from Excel into automated KPIs (Strike Rate, Average, Boundary Frequency) via a Power Query ETL pipeline.

title: RAG-Based Conversational AI System
description: Fully offline RAG pipeline using LangChain, Ollama, and ChromaDB. Delivers accurate, context-aware Q&A over institutional PDF documents with zero cloud dependency.
